SAKURAMOD-GENERIC.manifestPrompt: Choose a Clear Card to manifest.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_GALE.title: Gale
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_GALE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits:diff()} times.
For every 2 cards drawn this turn, attack 1 additional time.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Draw {ExtraDraw:diff()} cards.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_REFLECT.title: Reflect
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_REFLECT.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Gain {UpgradeBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
|}The next time an enemy attack hits you, [gold]Reflect[/gold] half of that attack's damage.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] [gold]Reflect[/gold] all of it instead.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_FLIGHT.title: Flight
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_ACTION.title: Action
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_ACTION.description:
Choose 1 card in your hand and Exhaust it.
[gold]Manifest[/gold] {Cards:diff()}. Manifested cards cost 0 this turn.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Draw {ExtraDraw:diff()} card(s).
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_APPEAR.title: Appear
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_APPEAR.description:
Choose 1 of 3 Clear Cards. Add a copy to your hand. It gains [red]Forgotten[/red].
[gold]Extra:[/gold] The copy costs 0 this turn.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_AQUA.title: Aqua
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_AQUA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {SakuraFrostbitePower:diff()} [gold]Frostbite[/gold] to enemies that have [gold]Frostbite[/gold].
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] This play does not [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_BLADE.title: Blade
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_BLADE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage {Hits:diff()} times.
For every 2 Sword cards played this combat, each hit deals 2 additional damage.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Attack 2 additional times.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_HAIL.title: Hail
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_HAIL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies 2 times.
Apply {SakuraFrostbitePower:diff()} [gold]Frostbite[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Apply 1 additional [gold]Frostbite[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_LUCID.title: Lucid
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_LUCID.description:
Look at the top {Look:diff()} cards of your draw pile.
Put 1 into your hand.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Your next Attack this turn ignores enemy [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SHADE.title: Shade
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SHADE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Retain your [gold]Block[/gold] until next turn.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SIEGE.title: Siege
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SIEGE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {ExtraBlock:diff()} additional [gold]Block[/gold] for each enemy.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SWING.title: Swing
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SWING.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies, then apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
For each [gold]Weak[/gold] on an enemy, damage is increased by {ExtraDamage:diff()}.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Double the [gold]Weak[/gold] damage bonus.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_BREAK.title: Break
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_BREAK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy has [gold]Block[/gold], {IfUpgraded:show:remove its [gold]Block[/gold], then |}deal double.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Remove 1 [gold]Artifact[/gold] and apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CHOICE.title: Choice
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CHOICE.description:
Choose: [gold]Manifest[/gold] {ManifestCards:diff()}; or draw {DrawCards:diff()} card(s).
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Do the chosen option twice.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CHOICE_DRAW_CHOICE.title: Draw
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_PROMISE.title: Promise
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_PROMISE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
At the start of your next turn, if you did not lose HP in the meantime, draw 1 card and gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold].
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Gain {PlatingPower:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_STRUGGLE.title: Struggle
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_STRUGGLE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
This card costs 1 less this turn for each other Attack you played earlier this turn.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_BLAZE.title: Blaze
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_BLAZE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
For each card in your [gold]Exhaust pile[/gold], deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Double this damage increase.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_DREAMING.title: Dreaming
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_DREAMING.description:
Before drawing at the start of each turn, look at the top 5 cards of your draw pile.
Choose 1 and put it on top; it costs 0 this turn and gains [red]Forgotten[/red].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_GRAVITATION.title: Gravitation
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_GRAVITATION.description:
This turn, when another played card would enter your discard pile, return it to your hand instead and increase its cost by 1 this turn.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Choose 1 card each from your discard pile and draw pile and add them to your hand.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_MIRAGE.title: Mirage
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_MIRAGE.description:
Choose 1 enemy.
That enemy deals 0 attack damage next turn.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Affect ALL enemies instead.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_RECORD.title: Record
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_RECORD.description:
If nothing is recorded, record your HP and Block. Otherwise, set your HP and Block to the recorded values, then [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
[gold]Extra:[/gold] When recording, draw {Cards:diff()} card. When replaying, gain {Energy:diff()} [gold]Energy[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_EXCHANGE.title: Exchange
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_EXCHANGE.description:
Draw 1 card.
Choose 2 cards in hand. Exchange their [red]Forgotten[/red] states and {IfUpgraded:show:combat-long|this-turn} costs.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_KINDNESS.title: Kindness
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_KINDNESS.description:
This combat, the next card that would be [gold]Exhausted[/gold] after being played is returned to your hand instead.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] It costs 0 this turn.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_LABYRINTH.title: Labyrinth
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_REPAIR.title: Repair
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_REPAIR.description:
Gain {RegenPower:diff()} [gold]Regeneration[/gold].
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Your [gold]Regeneration[/gold] no longer decreases at end of turn this combat.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_REVERSAL.title: Reversal
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_REVERSAL.description:
Exchange your draw pile and discard pile.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
For every {PileCardsPerDamage:diff()} cards exchanged, deal {PileDamage:diff()} additional damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Draw until your hand is full.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_REWIND.title: Rewind
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_REWIND.description:
Choose a card from your exhaust pile and return it to your hand.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] It costs 0 this turn.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SNOOZE.title: Snooze
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SPIRAL.title: Spiral
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SPIRAL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Each card in [gold]Memory[/gold] increases the damage and [gold]Block[/gold] by {MemoryScale:diff()}.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Add {ExtraCopies:diff()} Spiral copies to your hand. They gain [red]Forgotten[/red] and cost 0 this turn.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_TRANSFER.title: Transfer
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_TRANSFER.description:
An enemy loses {EnemyStrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Gain {StrengthGain:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {DexterityGain:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
[gold]Extra:[/gold] No longer [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_BLANK.title: Blank
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_BLANK.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
All Status and Curse cards gain [red]Forgotten[/red].
For each card that gains [red]Forgotten[/red] this way, draw 1 additional card next turn.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Remove your debuffs, as well as enemies' [gold]Artifact[/gold], [gold]Strength[/gold], and [gold]Dexterity[/gold] buffs.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_MIRROR.title: Mirror
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_MIRROR.description:
Choose a card in hand.
It gains {Repeat:diff()} [gold]Replay[/gold] this combat.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] It gains {ExtraRepeat:diff()} additional [gold]Replay[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_REMIND.title: Remind
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_REMIND.selectionPrompt: Choose {MaxCount} card(s) to Remind from Memory.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SYNCHRONIZE.title: Synchronize
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SYNCHRONIZE.description:
Choose 2 cards in hand.
This turn, when you play either one, automatically play the other.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_TIME.title: Time
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_TIME.description:
End your turn.
Take an extra turn.
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Keep your current [gold]Block[/gold], hand, unspent Energy, and Element states for that extra turn.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_TRUE_OR_FALSE.title: True or False
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_TRUE_OR_FALSE.descriptio:
Choose one: another card in hand gains [red]Forgotten[/red] and draw {Cards:diff()} cards; or [gold]Stabilize[/gold] 1 and gain {Energy:diff()} [gold]Energy[/gold].
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Do both.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_TRUE_OR_FALSE_DRAW_CHOIC:
Another card in hand gains [red]Forgotten[/red].
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_SWORD.title: Sword
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_SWORD.title: Sword
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_SWORD.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Firey[/gold]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and extra damage equal to {Magic:diff()}% of the enemy's current HP.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_SHIELD.title: Shield
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_SHIELD.title: Shield
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_SHIELD.descriptio:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Firey[/gold]
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Gain additional [gold]Block[/gold] equal to {Magic:diff()}% of your missing HP.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_JUMP.title: Jump
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_JUMP.description:
[gold]Windy[/gold]
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Remove 1 random debuff from yourself.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_JUMP.title: Jump
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_JUMP.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Windy[/gold]
At the start of your turn, remove {Magic:diff()} random debuff from yourself.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_ILLUSION.title: Illusion
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_ILLUSION.descriptio:
[gold]Windy[/gold]
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
For every 3 cards in your exhaust pile, gain extra {Magic:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_ILLUSION.extraDescr: [gold]Extra:[/gold] Count each card in your exhaust pile instead.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_ILLUSION.title: Illusion
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_MIST.title: Mist
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_MIST.extraDescripti: [gold]Extra:[/gold] First remove enemy [gold]Block[/gold] and defensive buffs.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_MIST.title: Mist
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_MIST.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Earthy[/gold]
Remove all enemy [gold]Block[/gold].
At the start of your turn, apply {NoxiousFumesPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to all enemies.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_RAIN.title: Rain
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_RAIN.description:
[gold]Watery[/gold]
All cards in your hand cost 1 less this turn.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_RAIN.extraDescripti: [gold]Extra:[/gold] This card goes to the discard pile after use.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_RAIN.title: Rain
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_RAIN.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Watery[/gold]
Randomly choose up to {Magic:diff()} cards in your hand.
They cost 0 this combat.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_SWEET.title: Sweet
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_SWEET.title: Sweet
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_SWEET.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Firey[/gold]
At the start of your turn, heal {Magic:diff()}% of your missing HP.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_VOICE.title: Voice
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_VOICE.description:
[gold]Windy[/gold] [gold]Invisible[/gold]
Put 1 copy of Voice into your discard pile.
At end of turn, if this card is in your hand, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Echo[/gold] {Magic:diff()}.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_VOICE.extraDescript: [gold]Extra:[/gold] Put 3 copies into your discard pile instead.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_VOICE.title: Voice
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_VOICE.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Windy[/gold]
At the start of your turn, put {Magic:diff()} Voice into your hand.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_CLOUD.title: Cloud
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_CLOUD.description:
[gold]Watery[/gold]
For each [gold]Watery card[/gold] in your hand, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_CLOUD.title: Cloud
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_CLOUD.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Watery[/gold]
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] once for each 3 [gold]Watery cards[/gold] in your deck.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_FLOWER.title: Flower
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_FLOWER.title: Flower
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_EARTHY.title: Earthy
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_EARTHY.description:
[gold]Earthy[/gold]
Put {Magic:diff()} Lei Di into your hand.
Enter [gold]Earthy state[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_EARTHY.title: Earthy
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_FIREY.title: Firey
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_FIREY.description:
[gold]Firey[/gold]
Put {Magic:diff()} Huo Shen into your hand.
Enter [gold]Firey state[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_FIREY.title: Firey
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_WATERY.title: Watery
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_WATERY.description:
[gold]Watery[/gold]
Put {Magic:diff()} Shui Long into your hand.
Enter [gold]Watery state[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_WATERY.title: Watery
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_WINDY.title: Windy
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_WINDY.description:
[gold]Windy[/gold]
Put {Magic:diff()} Feng Hua into your hand.
Enter [gold]Windy state[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_WINDY.title: Windy
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_WAVE.title: Wave
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_WAVE.description:
[gold]Watery[/gold]
Whenever you use an Attack, gain {Magic:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_WAVE.title: Wave
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_WAVE.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Watery[/gold]
Enter all four element states.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_BIG.title: Big
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_BIG.title: Big
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_BIG.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Firey[/gold]
Your attacks deal 33% more damage.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_BUBBLES.title: Bubbles
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_BUBBLES.description:
[gold]Watery[/gold]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Remove 1 random buff from the enemy.{IfUpgraded:show: 
If successful and you have Sealed Book, gain {Magic:diff()} [gold]Magic Charge[/gold].|}
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_BUBBLES.extraDescri: [gold]Extra:[/gold] Remove all buffs from the enemy.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_BUBBLES.title: Bubbles
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_BUBBLES.descripti:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Watery[/gold]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies and remove their buffs.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_CREATE.title: Create
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_CREATE.description:
[gold]Earthy[/gold] [gold]Windy[/gold] [gold]Removable[/gold]. [gold]Cost-Decreasing[/gold]. [gold]Entity-Limited[/gold].
Add {Relics:diff()} random relic to the battle reward.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_CREATE.title: Create
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_CREATE.descriptio:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Earthy[/gold] [gold]Windy[/gold] [gold]Removable[/gold].
Gain {Relics:diff()} relics as battle reward: one random relic and one character-exclusive relic.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_RETURN.title: Return
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_RETURN.title: Return
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_RETURN.descriptio:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Watery[/gold] [gold]Removable[/gold]
Restore all health and return 75% of the charge consumed by the last convert ({Magic:diff()}).
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_DREAM.title: Dream
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_DREAM.description:
[gold]Windy[/gold]
Put {Cards:diff()} random [gold]Clow Card[/gold] into your hand. It costs 0 this turn.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_DREAM.title: Dream
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_DREAM.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Windy[/gold]
Convert [gold]Clow Cards[/gold] in your hand into [gold]Sakura Cards[/gold] until end of turn.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_DARK.title: Dark
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_DARK.description:
[gold]Windy[/gold] [gold]Watery[/gold]
At the end of the turn, Exhaust up to {Magic:diff()} cards.
If you Exhaust any, gain 1 Energy next turn.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_DARK.title: Dark
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_DARK.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Windy[/gold] [gold]Watery[/gold]
At the end of the turn, Exhaust your hand and add the same number of upgraded random [gold]Clow Cards[/gold] to the discard pile.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_MIRROR.title: Mirror
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_MIRROR.selectionPro: Choose a Clow or Sakura card to copy.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_MIRROR.description:
[gold]Watery[/gold]
Choose {Copies:diff()} [gold]Clow Card[/gold] or [gold]Sakura Card[/gold] in your hand and copy it.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_MIRROR.extraDescrip: [gold]Extra:[/gold] Put {ExtraCopies:diff()} additional copy into your hand.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_MIRROR.title: Mirror
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_MIRROR.descriptio:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Watery[/gold]
Choose 1 [gold]Clow Card[/gold] and put a copy of it into your hand.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_LITTLE.title: Little
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_LITTLE.title: Little
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_LITTLE.descriptio:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Watery[/gold]
You take 33% less attack damage.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_LOCK.title: Lock
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_LOCK.description:
[gold]Firey[/gold]
Exhaust up to {Magic:diff()} cards.
Gain 1 [gold]Magic Charge[/gold] for each exhausted card.
[gold]Unreal[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_LOCK.title: Lock
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_LOCK.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Firey[/gold]
This turn does not reduce the number of charging layers when triggering the [gold]Magic Charge[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_LOOP.title: Loop
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_LOOP.description:
[gold]Earthy[/gold]
At the start of your turn, draw {Cards:diff()} card, then discard up to {Cards:diff()} card.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_LOOP.title: Loop
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_LOOP.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Earthy[/gold]
Whenever you discard a card, draw {Cards:diff()} card.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_POWER.title: Power
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_POWER.title: Power
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_MAZE.title: Maze
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_MAZE.title: Maze
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_SAND.title: Sand
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_SAND.title: Sand
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_SHOT.title: Shot
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_SHOT.title: Shot
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_SHADOW.title: Shadow
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_SHADOW.title: Shadow
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_DASH.title: Dash
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_DASH.title: Dash
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_DASH.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Windy[/gold]
Draw until your hand is full.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_FLY.title: Fly
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_FLY.title: Fly
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_FLY.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Windy[/gold]
At the start of your turn, draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_GLOW.title: Glow
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_GLOW.description:
[gold]Firey[/gold]
Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
If you have Sealed Book, gain {Magic:diff()} [gold]Magic Charge[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_GLOW.title: Glow
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_GLOW.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Firey[/gold]
At the start of your turn, gain {Magic:diff()} [gold]Magic Charge[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_LIBRA.title: Libra
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_LIBRA.description:
[gold]Firey[/gold]
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you have no [gold]Block[/gold], spend up to {Magic:diff()} [gold]Magic Charge[/gold] and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] again.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_LIBRA.title: Libra
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_LIBRA.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Firey[/gold]
Spend all [gold]Magic Charge[/gold].
For each spent, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_LIGHT.title: Light
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_LIGHT.description:
[gold]Earthy[/gold] [gold]Firey[/gold]
Increase your maximum hand size by 2.
[gold]Void[/gold] no longer makes you lose Energy when drawn.{IfUpgraded:show:
[gold]Void[/gold] can be used.
When you use [gold]Void[/gold], Exhaust it and draw 1 card.|}
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_LIGHT.title: Light
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_LIGHT.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Earthy[/gold] [gold]Firey[/gold]
Exhaust all Status and Curse cards in your hand, draw pile, and discard pile.
For each card exhausted this way, heal 1 HP and draw 1 card.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_CHANGE.title: Change
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_CHANGE.description:
[gold]Earthy[/gold]
Choose up to 1 card in your hand and discard it.
If you discard a card, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_CHANGE.title: Change
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_CHANGE.descriptio:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Earthy[/gold]
Discard your hand.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_ARROW.title: Arrow
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_ARROW.description:
[gold]Firey[/gold]
Choose any number of cards in your hand and discard them.
For each card discarded or each Energy lost, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_ARROW.title: Arrow
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_ARROW.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Firey[/gold]
Discard your draw pile.
For each unique [gold]Clow Card[/gold] or [gold]Sakura Card[/gold] discarded, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_MOVE.title: Move
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_MOVE.description:
[gold]Firey[/gold]
Put {Magic:diff()} Empty Spell into your hand.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_MOVE.extraDescripti: [gold]Extra:[/gold] Put 2 additional Empty Spells into it.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_MOVE.title: Move
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_MOVE.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Firey[/gold]
At the start of your turn, put {Magic:diff()} Empty Spell into your hand.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_FIGHT.title: Fight
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_FIGHT.description:
[gold]Earthy[/gold]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain 1 [gold]Magic Charge[/gold].
Gain {Magic:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
Put a copy of this card into your hand.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_FIGHT.title: Fight
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_FLOAT.title: Float
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_FLOAT.description:
[gold]Windy[/gold]
Whenever you draw a card, gain {Magic:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_FLOAT.title: Float
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_FLOAT.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Windy[/gold]
At the start of turn, gain {Magic:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_FREEZE.title: Freeze
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_FREEZE.title: Freeze
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_FREEZE.descriptio:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Watery[/gold]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If this is not an Elite or Boss combat, apply [gold]Freeze[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_STORM.title: Storm
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_STORM.description:
[gold]Windy[/gold]
Put 1 [gold]Void[/gold] into your discard pile.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Magic:diff()} times.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_STORM.extraDescript: [gold]Extra:[/gold] Deal damage to all enemies instead.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_STORM.title: Storm
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_STORM.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Windy[/gold]
Random enemies take {Magic:diff()} hits of {Damage:diff()} to {MaxDamage:diff()} damage.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_THROUGH.title: Through
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_THROUGH.description:
[gold]Earthy[/gold]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
If an enemy has [gold]Poison[/gold], {IfUpgraded:show:deepen [gold]Poison[/gold] by {Magic:diff()} and |}trigger [gold]Poison[/gold] damage once.
Put 1 [gold]Void[/gold] into your discard pile.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_THROUGH.extraDescri: [gold]Extra:[/gold] Also deal damage equal to {Rate:diff()}% of each enemy's max HP.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_THROUGH.title: Through
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_THROUGH.descripti:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Earthy[/gold]
Deal the higher of {Damage:diff()} and {Rate:diff()}% of each enemy's max HP to all enemies.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_ERASE.title: Erase
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_ERASE.description:
[gold]Windy[/gold]
Kill minions and non-Elite/Boss enemies at or below {KillPercent:diff()}% HP. Otherwise, deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_ERASE.title: Erase
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_ERASE.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Windy[/gold]
If the target is an Elite or Boss, gain 3 Energy. Otherwise, remove all of its powers and reduce it to 1 HP.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_SILENT.title: Silent
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_SILENT.description:
[gold]Watery[/gold]
Gain 1 [gold]Buffer[/gold].
Next turn, you cannot use Attack cards.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_SILENT.extraDescrip: [gold]Extra:[/gold] Do not disable attacking next turn.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_SILENT.title: Silent
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_SLEEP.title: Sleep
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_SLEEP.title: Sleep
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_WOOD.title: Wood
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_WOOD.description:
[gold]Earthy[/gold]
Gain {ThornsPower:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold].
At the start of the enemy turn, for each enemy: if it has no [gold]Poison[/gold], apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to it; otherwise, it loses {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_WOOD.title: Wood
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_WOOD.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Earthy[/gold]
Gain {ThornsPower:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold].
At the start of the enemy turn, apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to all enemies and they lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_SONG.title: Song
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_SONG.description:
[gold]Windy[/gold]
Exhaust up to X+1 cards.
For each exhausted card, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_SONG.title: Song
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_SONG.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Windy[/gold]
Exhaust any number of cards.
For each exhausted card, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_SNOW.title: Snow
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_SNOW.description:
[gold]Watery[/gold]
For each [gold]Watery Clow Card[/gold] played previously this combat, deal {SnowDamage:diff()} damage to a random enemy, {Magic:diff()} time(s) total.
Whenever this deals damage, apply 1 [gold]Frostbite[/gold] to that enemy.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_SNOW.extraDescripti:
[gold]Extra:[/gold] Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage to ALL enemies.
Apply 1 [gold]Frostbite[/gold] to each enemy that takes damage.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_SNOW.title: Snow
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_SNOW.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Watery[/gold]
For each [gold]Watery Clow or Sakura Card[/gold] played previously this combat, attack ALL enemies once.
Each attack deals {SnowDamage:diff()} damage; enemies that take damage gain 1 [gold]Frostbite[/gold] ({Magic:diff()} time(s) currently).
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_THUNDER.title: Thunder
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_THUNDER.description:
[gold]Earthy[/gold]
Requires 10 [gold]Magic Charge[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies {Magic:diff()} times.
Put 1 [gold]Void[/gold] into your discard pile.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_THUNDER.title: Thunder
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_THUNDER.descripti:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Earthy[/gold]
Spend all Energy and [gold]Magic Charge[/gold].
Attack once for each Energy spent and once for every {Magic:diff()} [gold]Magic Charge[/gold] spent.
Each hit deals {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_TIME.title: Time
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_TIME.description:
[gold]Watery[/gold]
At the end of this turn, do not discard your hand.
Keep your [gold]Block[/gold], unspent Energy, and Element states until next turn.
Put 1 [gold]Void[/gold] into your draw pile.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_TIME.extraDescripti: [gold]Extra:[/gold] Do not [gold]Exhaust[/gold] this card after playing it.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_TIME.title: Time
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_TIME.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Watery[/gold]
Apply {ClassicTimePower:diff()} [gold]Time[/gold] to all enemies, ignoring [gold]Artifact[/gold].
Put 1 [gold]Void[/gold] into your discard pile.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_TWIN.title: Twin
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_TWIN.description:
[gold]Firey[/gold] [gold]Watery[/gold]
The next [gold]Clow Card[/gold] you use each turn is used twice.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_TWIN.title: Twin
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_TWIN.description:
[gold]Sakura Card[/gold] [gold]Firey[/gold] [gold]Watery[/gold]
[gold]Clow Cards[/gold] cost {Amount:diff()} more this combat and are used {Amount:diff()} additional time(s).
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_CLOW_NOTHING.title: Nothing
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_LOVE.title: Love
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_HOPE.title: Hope
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_HOPE.description: All your normal damage and [gold]Block[/gold] are doubled this combat.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SAKURA_LEGACY.title: Legacy
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SPELL_SEAL.title: Seal
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SPELL_SEAL.description:
[gold]Spell[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this kills a monster, Sealed Wand gains 2 additional charge.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SPELL_RELEASE.title: Release
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SPELL_RELEASE.selectionP: Choose a card in your hand.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SPELL_RELEASE.descriptio:
[gold]Spell[/gold].
Choose a [gold]Clow Card[/gold], [gold]Sakura Card[/gold], or [gold]Clear Card[/gold] in your hand.
It costs 0 this turn, gains Exhaust, and its numbers increase by 50% until used.
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SPELL_TURN.title: Turn
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SPELL_TURN.selectionProm: Choose a Clow card to turn into Sakura.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SPELL_TURN.description:
[gold]Spell[/gold].
Choose an eligible [gold]Clow Card[/gold] in your hand. Remove its deck card and put the matching [gold]Sakura Card[/gold] into your deck and hand.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SPELL_EMPTY_SPELL.title: Empty Spell
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SPELL_EMPTY_SPELL.descri:
[gold]Spell[/gold].
Choose 1 of Huo Shen, Lei Di, Feng Hua, or Shui Long and put it into your hand.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SPELL_HUO_SHEN.title: Huo Shen
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SPELL_LEI_DI.title: Lei Di
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SPELL_LEI_DI.description:
[gold]Spell[/gold] [gold]Earthy[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SPELL_FENG_HUA.title: Feng Hua
SAKURA_MOD_CARD_SPELL_SHUI_LONG.title: Shui Long
